servinfo.title: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation (9-Channel Air Bag System)

item.ptxt: Be sure to read Precautions for Handling and Storage of Air Bag System Components before starting service operation and observe every precaution during work. Neglecting them may result in personal injury or non-activation of the air bag system in the event of collision.

Never insert screwdriver or any other foreign matter between knee air bag (inflator) module and “G222” connector, as static electricity from such object may cause accidental deployment of knee air bag.
Be fully careful and observe every precaution described in Precautions for Handling and Storage of Air Bag System Components when handling and storing live knee air bag (inflator) module.

s1.ptxt: Remove knee air bag (inflator) module bolts (1), then remove knee air bag (inflator) module (2).
Disconnect knee air bag (inflator) module connector (2) as shown in figure.

servinfosub.title: Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Knee Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection (9-Channel Air Bag System)

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Securely lock connector after connecting it to air bag (inflator) module.
Make sure harness is not pinched or exposed outside.
Tighten knee air bag (inflator) module bolts to specified torque.
